description_long: This is a stylized, low-polygon representation of a deer, featuring a slender body, long legs, and a prominent set of branched antlers. The deer's coat is rendered in shades of brown, with subtle color variation to suggest musculature and natural fur patterns. Its head is elongated with a pointed snout, large upright ears, and expressive eyes. The legs are thin and end in small, dark-colored hooves, giving the animal a delicate yet agile appearance. The tail is short and slightly raised, blending into the rear of the body. The overall form is angular and geometric, emphasizing the deer's elegant and alert stance.
description: A low-poly brown deer with large antlers, slender legs, and a short tail, standing in an alert posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deer's face, antlers, and chest, with both ears and all four legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the body, the profile of the head, and the antlers extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, short tail, and the symmetry of the antlers, with legs positioned apart.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the elongated body, head profile, and antlers, with the tail and legs visible.
